name: Agudo

skills.name: Mountain Encounter
skills.description: Replaces Recovery with Release. Upon releasing monsters, they grant her Gold, EXP, and their respective blessing. Her Basic Attacks drop Seed Mines around enemy targets.

skills.name: Wild Growth
skills.description: Grants Movement Speed and Health recovery to allied units in the target area. Additionally, she gains Attack Speed and summons multiple monsters at the center.

skills.name: Tumble, Furball!
skills.description: Rolls forward, dealing damage to nearby enemies. Gains immunity against 1 hard crowd control, and damages and launches enemies hit.

skills.name: Seed Mines
skills.description: Agudo rolls forward and enhances her next Basic Attack to drops 3 Seed Mines and deal Physical Damage.

tips: Agudo (Marksman): Tier B on international ranked — 51.91% WR.
Build core: Hunting Knife, Relentless Blade, Boots of Dexterity.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 51.91%, pick 0.44%, ban 0.04%, popularity tier B.
Counters Kongming, Daji · Weak into Ata, Han Xin.

faqs.question: Is Agudo good in current season?
faqs.answer: Agudo is Tier B Marksman with 51.91% win rate, 0.44% pick rate, and 0.04% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Agudo build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Hunting Knife, Relentless Blade, Boots of Dexterity, Shadow Ripper, Eternity Blade, Rapacious Bite. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Agudo?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Agudo: Ata, Han Xin. Agudo is strong into Kongming, Daji.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Kongming, Daji. Countered by: Ata, Han Xin.
